summary: Iteration 2 backend + frontend tested. Backend 16/16 iteration2 tests PASS (quick task planning/waiting_approval, Claude Sonnet 4.5 generate endpoint, generate-blocked-on-approval 400, knowledge CRUD, integrations catalog/toggle, sandbox mode, regression on auth/agents/goals/tasks/approvals/stats/activity). Frontend: Login, dashboard tiles (Knowledge + Integrations), Knowledge add+delete, Integrations toggle on/off → CONNECTED · SANDBOX badge, Agents tab Open-workspace (7 non-CEO cards), Workspace screen (stats, filter chips, quick-task creation, Generate output rendering AI deliverable) all work. Found and fixed 1 CRITICAL UI bug: CEO tab → tap recent goal threw 'router is not defined' red-screen at app/(tabs)/ceo.tsx:125 — useRouter() was imported but never instantiated. Added `const router = useRouter();` and re-verified — goal detail screen now loads with full workflow timeline (8 tasks, 7 generate buttons).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. RN web deprecation, low priority. Reference: emitted on most screens with Pressable.

action_items: Optional: migrate any `pointerEvents` prop usages to `style={{ pointerEvents: ... }}` to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.

Optional cleanup: in old /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py, replace substring `'_id' not in r.text` checks with field-based recursion (see _has_id_leak in test_iteration2.py) to eliminate two known false positives (goal_id / agent_id substrings).
critical_code_review_comments: app/(tabs)/ceo.tsx line 125 originally referenced an undefined `router` symbol (useRouter imported but never called). Fixed by instantiating `const router = useRouter();` at top of CEOPage.
server.py is ~850 lines and approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling — consider splitting auth/agents/goals/tasks/knowledge/integrations into separate routers for maintainability.
All Mongo reads correctly use `{'_id': 0}` projection — no _id leaks confirmed via recursive field check.

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 iteration2; existing baseline 13/15 with 2 known-false-positive substring checks)
success_rate.frontend: 100% after the one ceo.tsx router fix

seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed tasks (marketing/sales quick tasks) and a TEST_Brand voice knowledge note during testing. They live under the seeded founder account; safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE_URL = https://executive-team-ai-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Seed login founder@unnatix.dev / Founder@123. Use /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py as the canonical regression — its _has_id_leak helper does recursive field-based detection rather than substring matching. Integrations endpoints are intentionally SANDBOX/MOCKED (no real OAuth) — UI displays a yellow 'SANDBOX MODE · MOCKED' banner. /api/tasks/{id}/generate calls Claude Sonnet 4.5 (~10-25s) so use timeout>=120s. CEO tab's recent-goal navigation depends on useRouter being instantiated — verify after any refactor of (tabs)/ceo.tsx.
rca_of_issue: ROUTER BUG RCA: In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/ceo.tsx the file imported `useRouter` from expo-router at line 4 but never invoked it. Line 125's Pressable onPress called `router.push(...)` referencing an undefined identifier, so tapping a 'RECENT OBJECTIVES' row crashed React Native Web with 'Uncaught Error: router is not defined'. Fix: add `const router = useRouter();` as the first statement inside `CEOPage`. Verified: tapping recent goal now navigates to /goal/{id} and the goal-detail screen renders objective, summary, progress (13%), 8 task cards, 7 generate buttons.
